title: Independent directive verification (final gate; non-producer; N=5 panel)
manager: headless claude -p; exits at turn end; foreground watches only
objective: Independently verify the ENTIRE README.md directive (UC1 session/text, UC2 bundle round-trip, UC3 CLI, acceptance shape, posture) from ground truth. Verification ONLY: mutate nothing except orchestration/reports/M-004/, VERIFICATION.md, this state file, the handoff, and the closeout commit. Fix NOTHING; report defects + recommend a fix mission.
constraints: NON-PRODUCER posture: producer handoffs (M-002/M-003) + all reports are CLAIMS to re-derive, never evidence. Ground truth = committed repo @ HEAD + what running it does.
NEVER contact chatgpt.com/openai; loopback/local only; clean clone is file-protocol from local path into tmp/verify-m004/clone only.
Best-of-N default = N=5 panel with DISTINCT dimensions over ONE authoritative T1 evidence run (panel does NOT each re-run heavy suite).
uv sync --all-groups ALWAYS; serialize pytest; ephemeral ports; never git push; never touch shared agent venv; never write .claude/ or .agents/.
CLI default --channel real: a raw ask-chatgpt invocation has NO pytest socket guard -> T1 must never invoke CLI with default channel.

T1.role: single heavy runner -> tmp/verify-m004/ + orchestration/reports/M-004/verify-run.md (INDEX, capture-only, no judgement)
T1.note: T1 ran uv sync with UV_OFFLINE=1 (over-strict reading of safety block) -> clone venv greenlet cache miss -> full pytest/accept x3/netguard BLOCKED. Still-valid rows captured: git_state, clone HEAD==main HEAD 7755193, inventory, greps, zip-slip 4-vector (all PathEscapeError, canary absent, root unchanged), CLI argparse guardrails (exit 2). Manager rebuilt clone venv via normal network-allowed `uv sync --all-groups` (greenlet from PyPI; project editable from clone src) -> validated. T1b completes the blocked heavy runs.

T1b.role: complete the offline-blocked heavy runs inside the now-built clone; overwrite verify-run.md as the complete corrected index
T1b.result: verify-run.md T1-STATUS: DONE; clone_pytest 119 passed in 43.60s; accept_uc1/2/3 overall=pass (manager-verified independently); netguard 2 passed; cli_tests 28 passed; zip-slip 4 vectors all PathEscapeError + canary absent + root unchanged; CLI guardrails exit 2.

defects: UC3 --session implemented (cli.py:102,63) but not exercised by any test/acceptance
real-site-acceptance.md runbook stale vs cli.py (--profile/--patch-out/apply-patch subcommand/--bundle do not exist)

T2b.note: clean clone reproduced green (HEAD match, 119 passed); UC1 continuity conv-1 reused; UC2 diff-match true both download+fenced; UC3 stdout/--out/dry-run consistent; 8 sampled tests non-vacuous.

defects: Checks 1-6 PASS. CHECK 7 FAIL: real channel not fail-closed before non-loopback navigation. driver.py start() goto(REAL_BASE_URL=chatgpt.com) at line 90 before any selector check; empty real.json selectors only raise SelectorUnavailableError on later selector use. channel=real + profile_path can navigate to chatgpt.com first. Manager-confirmed from driver.py. Mitigation: tests never set real (socket-guarded); default CLI w/o profile fails pre-nav.

CHECK1/2/5 PASS (D-001 matches code; 5 bundle-protocol claims match; mock-vs-real honesty OK). CHECK3 FAIL: real-site-acceptance.md uses non-existent CLI flags/subcommands (--profile/--patch-out/apply-patch/--bundle) + wrong error names (PatchBundleMalformedError vs PatchMalformedError etc). CHECK4 FAIL(minor): telemetry data present as JSON (ESTIMATE_minutes/ACTUAL_minutes) but not literal ESTIMATE:/ACTUAL:/REWORK-CAUSE: line convention in handoffs.

T3.note: VERIFICATION.md + verify.md shipped (manager-verified: both end with VERDICT/M-004-VERDICT: FAIL). Per-obligation table 7 PASS/4 FAIL; reconciliation = scope not fact; 3 spot-checks re-derived from raw artifacts.

artifacts_trust.tmp/verify-m004/ (authoritative evidence: verified-independently (manager spot-checked: T1-STATUS DONE, 3x overall=pass, 119 passed, netguard 2 passed, zip-slip closed)
artifacts_trust.orchestration/reports/M-004/verify-run.m: verified-independently (complete corrected index; last line T1-STATUS: DONE)
artifacts_trust.tmp/verify-m004/clone_sync_RECOVERY.txt: manager-authored (records the network-allowed clone venv rebuild that resolved the offline blocker)

final_verdict: FAIL (final; T3 synthesis VERDICT: FAIL, verify.md M-004-VERDICT: FAIL). Panel 3 FAIL [T2a spec, T2c safety, T2e docs] / 2 PASS [T2b correctness, T2d failure-modes]. Automated functional core PASSES (UC1/UC2/UC3 acceptance overall=pass, 119 tests pass in clean clone, failure modes complete, zip-slip closed, validate-before-mutate, tests never contact chatgpt.com). Directive NOT fully achieved -> M-005 fix mission required (do NOT fix here; independence).
mission_status: PARTIAL (verification fully executed; directive verdict FAIL; M-005 required)

recommended_next_mission.type: fix (producer mission; then re-verify via a fresh non-producer panel)

defects.title: Real-site acceptance runbook stale vs committed CLI + error class names
defects.evidence: docs/runbooks/real-site-acceptance.md uses --profile/--patch-out/`apply-patch` subcommand/--bundle (none in cli.py:100-114) + error names PatchBundleMalformedError/PatchBundleIntegrityError/PatchBundleTooLargeError/PatchPathEscapeError vs actual PatchMalformedError/BundleIntegrityError/OversizedPayloadError/PathEscapeError (errors.py)
defects.fix: rewrite runbook UC2/UC3 to the committed one-shot CLI (--profile-path, --files/--dirs, --out, --dry-run/--apply, --root) and correct error names; OR implement the documented CLI surface. Most material: this is the operator-gated real-site proof path.

defects.title: Real channel not fail-closed before navigation to chatgpt.com
defects.evidence: driver.py start() launches persistent context then page.goto(REAL_BASE_URL=https://chatgpt.com) at line 90 before any selector access; empty real.json selectors only raise SelectorUnavailableError on later use; load_selector_map does not reject empty maps. channel=real + profile_path navigates first. Mitigation: tests never set real (socket-guarded); default CLI w/o profile raises AskChatGPTError pre-nav.
defects.fix: add pre-navigation real selector-map readiness check that raises SelectorUnavailableError before launch_persistent_context/page.goto; add a non-networking unit test proving no chatgpt.com navigation attempt for the empty template.

defects.title: UC3 CLI --session not exercised by any test/acceptance
defects.evidence: cli.py:102 defines --session, cli.py:63 passes it; no test/script/accept_uc3 invokes it. Underlying ask_chatgpt continuity IS tested.
defects.fix: add a CLI test + accept_uc3 step invoking ask-chatgpt --session <id> twice against the mock proving conversation reuse through the CLI.

defects.title: Telemetry literal-line convention absent in M-002/M-003 handoffs
defects.evidence: handoffs carry ESTIMATE_minutes/ACTUAL_minutes JSON + prose, but exact-token grep finds no bare ESTIMATE:/ACTUAL:/REWORK-CAUSE: lines.
defects.fix: backfill or supersede handoff telemetry so grep-visible literal lines exist; add a lightweight handoff check.

resume_notes: Fresh start (no prior state). On resume: re-verify each task's report/status file exists on disk before re-dispatch. T1 ships tmp/verify-m004/* + verify-run.md. T2a-e ship lens-*.md each ending T2x-STATUS. T3 ships VERIFICATION.md + verify.md ending M-004-VERDICT. Worker run_dirs recorded above as discovered. NEVER re-dispatch a task whose report exists with a STATUS/VERDICT line (verify shipment, not liveness).
